creator: freebsd-vheg@riseup.net
text:
In [1] multi-instance support has been added to security/tor.

After upgrading to tor alpha releases via tor-devel I realized that tor-devel has no multi-instance support yet.

Can we get multi-instance support for tor-devel as well?

thanks,
nusenu

[1] https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=207129
